calendar.matters:
Osc Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-08-2003 Text Ruling

MOTION To Reconsider And Modify Or Revoke Order Granting In Part Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus;
Off Calendar May-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Albert J. Garcia, Esq. 510/848-5190 for petitioner & opposing party; Lynne K. Dombrowski, Deputy Atty General 703-5578 for respondent & moving party.
RULING: Argued and petitioner to submit additional brief limited to 5 pages on 04/17; response due on 04/26; reply due on 05/03 at which time the Court will take the matter under submission; each to submit proposed orders as well (w/their respective last submittals). Respondent to prepare order re briefing schedule.

Not Of Mot To Reconsider And Modify Or Revoke Order Granting In Part Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Text Ruling

MOTION (1st)Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Albert J. Garcia, Esq. 510/848-5190 for petitioner & moving party; Lynne K. Dombrowski, Deputy Atty General 703-5578 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Deny writ.
Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Each to prepare proposed orders by 01/04.
